site_brief.goal: Create a conversion-focused landing page for this audience. Tie current market evidence to pain points, then show how Super can operate apps and reuse a computer-use cache for repeated work.

site_brief.title: Super for real estate agents managing follow-ups, listings, and scheduling

summary: A conversion‑focused niche landing page for real estate agents who want an AI that actually runs their follow‑ups, listing workflows, and scheduling inside real apps. Super is positioned as the sharper alternative for repeated computer‑use workflows thanks to its reusable computer‑use cache.
